creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
From <https://www.freshports.org/editors/aee#description>: 

> … as well as a graphical user interface under X windows (xae). …

----

% xae
xae: Command not found.
% man aee
% pkg info --list aee
aee-2.2.21_2:
        /usr/local/bin/aee
        /usr/local/bin/rae
        /usr/local/man/man1/aee.1.gz
        /usr/local/share/aee/help.ae
        /usr/local/share/licenses/aee-2.2.21_2/ART10
        /usr/local/share/licenses/aee-2.2.21_2/LICENSE
        /usr/local/share/licenses/aee-2.2.21_2/catalog.mk
% 

----

Also: 

man 1 aee

– describes use of another non-found binary, rxae, but I'm not complaining :-)

Assuming that there'll not be a port of the GUI in the near future, this bug can be: 

* to remove the irrelevant line from the package description. 

Plus, maybe, add a package message to explain that the GUI variants are not ported. 

Thanks
